_note: Archived stories S208-S211 from prd-v3.json. All passes:true as of 2026-04-26. Phase 7 (Focused Learning) complete. Kept for reference only.

stories.title: Pomodoro session backend: model, service, and API
stories.summary: PomodoroSessionModel + pomodoro_service (start/pause/resume/complete/abandon), POST /pomodoro/* endpoints, GET /pomodoro/stats with today_count + streak_days + total_completed, single active-or-paused invariant, nullable goal_id reserved for S210.

stories.title: Global focus timer pill in app header
stories.summary: FocusTimerPill in app header, Zustand focus store, surface auto-detected from active tab, localStorage persistence with /pomodoro/active rehydrate, chime on focus complete, stats popover with Today/Streak/Total.

stories.title: Learning goals backend: typed goals, progress aggregation, session linking
stories.summary: LearningGoalModel + learning_goals_service with type-dispatched compute_progress (read/recall/write/explore), CRUD + link/unlink session endpoints, FK from pomodoro_sessions.goal_id ON DELETE SET NULL, goalless sessions still count toward stats.

stories.title: Learning goals UI on Study tab and Attach-to-goal in timer popover
stories.summary: GoalsList sub-section on Study tab, GoalCreateDialog, GoalDetailPanel with progress bar + linked sessions, FocusTimerPill 'Attach to goal' selector, surface mismatch warning, stripMarkdown previews per I-12.
